image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about blood pressure basics.
Context visual: Blood pressure measures the force of blood against your arteries.
Escalation visual: High blood pressure can lead to serious health issues—think heart attacks.
Evidence visual: Studies show that reducing salt intake significantly lowers blood pressure.
Payoff visual: Managing stress and regular exercise also play crucial roles.
Cta visual: Curious about your blood pressure? Check with a doctor today!
